title: campanopsis divergens
intro: Campanopsis divergens, also known as Korean bellflower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Campanopsis divergens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and health benefits.
